what_it_does: Defines a 24 by 24 SVG outline icon showing a cloud with a downward download arrow.
observations: Root svg sets xmlns, viewBox, width, height, fill, stroke, stroke-width, stroke-linecap, and stroke-linejoin.
The icon uses currentColor for its stroke and no fill.
One path draws the cloud outline.
One path draws a vertical line and downward arrow shape.
standouts: Stroke-only currentColor rendering makes the icon inherit surrounding text color.
The cloud and download glyph are encoded in two path elements.
conventions: Uses a 24x24 viewBox with matching width and height.
Uses rounded stroke caps and joins.
Uses inline path data rather than reusable symbol definitions or groups.
concerns: No title, desc, role, or aria attributes are present for standalone accessibility semantics.
notes: A compact reusable SVG asset for a cloud download action.
questions: Is accessible labeling expected to be supplied by the consuming component?
Should the icon remain purely stroke-based in all contexts?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a cloud-download icon, and the SVG content depicts a cloud with a downward arrow.
intention_signals: It appears intended as a scalable, color-inheriting UI icon for cloud download controls or labels.
contribution: Contributes a reusable currentColor outline asset representing cloud download, with fixed 24px geometry and simple path-based construction.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 stroke-only SVG cloud-download icon with a cloud outline and downward arrow using currentColor.
intention_for_embedding: This file was for providing a reusable themeable icon asset for cloud download actions.
